PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) demonstrates shared asymmetric KV-pool compression for multi-agent inference cutting Llama-3-8B 15-agent KV memory from 19.8GB to 0.45GB.

validation_rows.evidence_summary: Apr 29 Powell carry-forward into Apr 30: Powell stays on Board for "a period of time to be determined" past May 15 Chair-term expiration; first Fed Chair since 1948 to do so; rejects "shadow chair" framing; Warsh nomination confirmed by Senate Banking Apr 29 with full-Senate vote pending before May 15. May 1 Apr jobs print at 8:30 AM EDT; consensus 135K vs March 178K — first weakening data into the handoff window. April Mag 7 best month since 2020 partly priced on rate-cut hopes.

reference_links.label: PBS NewsHour - Powell says he will stay on Fed board after chair term ends
BLS - Schedule of Releases for the Employment Situation
TheStreet - Stock Market Today (Apr. 30, 2026)

bridge.narrative: The Apr 30 carry of Powell's 1948-precedent Board-stay plus the Warsh full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15 plus the May 1 Apr jobs print as the first weakening data into the handoff window land exactly the institutional-volatility setup the prediction depends on. Today's evidence operationalizes the prediction's premise rather than testing it.
bridge.remaining_gap: The first Warsh-led FOMC press conference re-anchoring dissent at ≤2 plus a financial-press structural-analysis piece treating the 1992 precedent as a steady-state reference point.

Layer 1 keyword hit on the source name with no Layer 2 semantic match.
